payload_policy: The candidate payload identified by the exact SHA-256 above is adopted byte-for-byte as the immutable contract configuration; changing that file invalidates this acceptance envelope and requires a new version.

numerical_policy.purpose: Inclusive extremeness comparison guard only; it does not change score equality, alpha, or practical significance.

acceptance_method: Deterministic dependency-bound derivation, mathematical boundary and worked-example fixtures, exhaustive 1024-assignment confirmatory fixtures, append-only evidence, and plain-C# Unity parity.
production_authorization: Scoring/statistical component accepted for P0-R7 integration only; the production Test Engine remains blocked until the complete Calibration Configuration v1 passes the P0-R7 exit gate.
